notes:
NovaPanel v0.6.57

- Update checker now fetches latest-version.json fresh on every check.
- Cache-busting: ?t=Date.now() appended to feed URL so CDN/proxies treat each request as unique.
- Request headers: Cache-Control: no-cache + Pragma: no-cache sent with every version check.
- Feed URL logged before request: [updater] fetching update feed: <url>?t=<timestamp>.
- Both installed and fetched versions logged: [updater] fetched version / installed.
- Update-available log includes both versions: [updater] update available: 0.6.56 → 0.6.57.
